title: Kenyan Smoky Cheese Fritter
description: A crispy, cheesy, and savory snack inspired by Kenyan cuisine. Perfect for a quick bite.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together the flour, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the grated cheese and mix until well combined.
In a separate bowl, beat the egg.
Add the crispy fried onions to the egg and mix well.
Add the egg mixture to the cheese mixture and mix until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk.
Place the disks on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
